characters.appearance: Black woman in her 30s, medium build, dark complexion. She has short, curly black hair and clear facial features. No obvious distinguishing marks.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid green crew-neck t-shirt throughout the entire video.
characters.demeanor: Earnest, eager to learn, and enthusiastic.

characters.appearance: White woman in her 30s, slim build, fair complexion. She has shoulder-length, wavy brown hair. Her face is symmetrical with a soft appearance.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a dark blue top with a subtle v-neckline throughout the video.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Office में सबको लगता है मेरी English अच्छी है। [Everyone in the office thinks my English is good.]
Character A says: But सच तो ये है... [But the truth is...]
Character A says: Meetings में जब कुछ समझ नहीं आता, तो मैं बस यही बोलती हूँ... [In meetings when I don't understand something, I just say this...]
Character A says: Can you repeat that? [Can you repeat that?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable workplace insecurity.
- Establishes the core problem: knowing basic English but lacking professional vocabulary.
- Builds empathy with the target audience of working professionals.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Office में सबको लगता है मेरी English अच्छी है।
But सच तो ये है...
Meetings में जब कुछ समझ नहीं आता,
तो मैं बस यही बोलती हूँ...
Can you repeat that?

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: ये ठीक है, but professional setting में आप कह सकते हो... [That's fine, but in a professional setting you can say...]
Character B says: Could you run that by me again? [Could you run that by me again?]
Character B says: ये ज़्यादा confident sound करता है। [This sounds more confident.]
Character A says: Could you run that by me again? [Could you run that by me again?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core value proposition: practical AI correction.
- Establishes the warm, encouraging 'older sibling' tone of the AI tutor.
- Shows immediate application and practice by the learner.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
ये ठीक है, but professional setting में आप कह सकते हो...
Could you run that by me again?
ये ज़्यादा confident sound करता है।
Could you run that by me again? (with a green checkmark icon)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Perfect! अब इसे try करो... [Perfect! Now try this...]
Character A says: I didn't understand your point. [I didn't understand your point.]
Character B says: इसकी जगह बोलो, "I didn't quite catch that." [Instead of this, say, "I didn't quite catch that."]
Character B says: एकदम natural लगेगा। [It will sound completely natural.]
Character A says: I didn't quite catch that. [I didn't quite catch that.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the learning loop with a second practical workplace example.
- Highlights the transition from textbook English to natural spoken English.
- Builds the learner's confidence through successful repetition.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Perfect! अब इसे try करो...
I didn't understand your point. (with a red X icon)
इसकी जगह बोलो, "I didn't quite catch that."
एकदम natural लगेगा।
I didn't quite catch that. (with a green checkmark icon)

scenes.scene_label: The Reveal and Call to Action
scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मेरी English बुरी नहीं है, बस अटक जाती हूँ। [My English isn't bad, I just get stuck.]
Character A says: और रोज़ एक real tutor afford करना मुश्किल है। [And affording a real tutor every day is difficult.]
Character B says: That's why I am here! मैं आपकी AI tutor हूँ, [That's why I am here! I am your AI tutor,]
Character B says: जो 24/7 आपके साथ practice करने के लिए ready है। [who is ready to practice with you 24/7.]
Character A says: Supernova app try करो। [Try the Supernova app.]
Character A says: और बिना डरे, confidently English बोलो। [And speak English confidently, without fear.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the cost and accessibility barriers of traditional tutoring.
- Reveals the AI tutor solution as an affordable, anytime option.
- Delivers a strong, encouraging Call to Action for the Supernova app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मेरी English बुरी नहीं है, बस अटक जाती हूँ।
और रोज़ एक real tutor afford करना मुश्किल है।
That's why I am here! मैं आपकी AI tutor हूँ,
जो 24/7 आपके साथ practice करने के लिए ready है।
Supernova app try करो।
और बिना डरे, confidently English बोलो।
>> Start speaking (button graphic)
